positive: A stylized and abstract composition featuring a group of interconnected geometric shapes forming a whimsical forest landscape. The foreground should include stylized, simple silhouettes of various flora and fauna (e.g., geometric trees, hummingbirds, stylized foxes). Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of teal, burnt orange, and deep navy blue. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centralized, suitable for repeating apparel pattern. The style should emulate Art Deco meets Mid-Century Modern graphic design, with crisp vector lines, flat color blocking, and bold outlines. Maintain negative space balance across all elements. Seamless composition for printing.
negative: photorealism, complex details, messy, noisy, blurred, text, watermark, logo, signature, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, tiling, realistic skin, low saturation, gradient, gradients, gradients, grainy
